title: ParseError->SieveError From relies on undocumented line-presence invariant
description: parse_error.rs line 86: From<ParseError> for SieveError infers SieveErrorKind::Lex vs ::Parse from e.line.is_some(). The invariant 'lexer always sets line; form parser never does' is only documented on the struct, not in the From impl. A contributor adding a form-layer error with line info would silently produce a Lex kind. Add a comment in the From impl citing the invariant, or split into two error types at the type level.
